channel.title: Posts on Akram
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Akram

item.title: There Is No State of the Art in AI Agent Authentication (And That's a Problem)
item.description: On discovering we’re reinventing square wheels while ignoring centuries of working trust models—and what Red Hat can do about it.

item.title: Power of Attorney Model: A civilizational approach for AI agent authentication, trust, delegation and revocation
item.description: From JWT+SPIFFE fatigue to a Friday afternoon ban: borrowing Power of Attorney as a civilizational pattern for AI agents.

item.title: When the weight of civilizations beats system design
item.description: A short essay on organisation darwinism: centuries of human coordination already shaped the patterns we now encode in protocols and law.

item.title: Back to posting
item.description: After a long quiet stretch, I am picking the blog back up again—this time on Hugo with the Blowfish theme.
